member.name: P:HRB.Platform.Client.WPF.Core.Instruments.SimpleAudioPlayerWPF.CurrentPosition
member.Summary: Current position of audio in seconds

member.name: P:HRB.Platform.Client.WPF.Core.Instruments.SimpleAudioPlayerWPF.Balance
member.Summary: Balance left/right: -1 is 100% left : 0% right, 1 is 100% right : 0% left, 0 is equal volume left/right

member.name: P:HRB.Platform.Client.WPF.Core.Instruments.SimpleAudioPlayerWPF.IsPlaying
member.Summary: Indicates if the currently loaded audio file is playing

member.name: P:HRB.Platform.Client.WPF.Core.Instruments.SimpleAudioPlayerWPF.Loop
member.Summary: Continously repeats the currently playing sound

member.name: P:HRB.Platform.Client.WPF.Core.Instruments.SimpleAudioPlayerWPF.CanSeek
member.Summary: Indicates if the position of the loaded audio file can be updated

member.name: M:HRB.Platform.Client.WPF.Core.Instruments.SimpleAudioPlayerWPF.Load(System.IO.Stream)
member.Summary: Load wave or mp3 audio file from a stream

member.name: M:HRB.Platform.Client.WPF.Core.Instruments.SimpleAudioPlayerWPF.Play
member.Summary: Begin playback or resume if paused

member.name: M:HRB.Platform.Client.WPF.Core.Instruments.SimpleAudioPlayerWPF.Pause
member.Summary: Pause playback if playing (does not resume)

member.name: M:HRB.Platform.Client.WPF.Core.Instruments.SimpleAudioPlayerWPF.Stop
member.Summary: Stop playack and set the current position to the beginning

member.name: M:HRB.Platform.Client.WPF.Core.Instruments.SimpleAudioPlayerWPF.Seek(System.Double)
member.Summary: Seek a position in seconds in the currently loaded sound file
